name: library-docs
description: Fetch current, version-accurate documentation for any third-party library, framework, SDK, API, or CLI tool via the Context7 MCP server before answering questions about it, falling back to a web fetch/search when Context7 isn't connected. Auto-engages via the 'library-docs' skill whenever a question is anchored to a specific library or framework, even one you already know well, since a library's docs move faster than training data.
